messages.subject: [R-SIG-Finance] quantstrat: Missing function?
messages.body_plain:
Hi All:

Is the following function called by osMaxPos missing from the quanstrat
package:


> library(quantstrat)
Loading required package: xts
Loading required package: zoo
Loading required package: TTR
Loading required package: blotter
Loading required package: quantmod
Loading required package: Defaults
Loading required package: FinancialInstrument

> getPosLimit
Error: object 'getPosLimit' not found
> 



Thanks in advance,
Krish
-- 
View this message in context: http://r.789695.n4.nabble.com/quantstrat-Missing-function-tp2274567p2274567.html
Sent from the Rmetrics mailing list archive at Nabble.com.
